overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a winding dirt path through open prairie grassland during sunset. The video captures the atmospheric transition from golden hour through deep purple dusk into night, with the character passing a windmill and fence line along the rural trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie trail at golden hour

events.description: horse rider passes by on the path ahead and exits view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward a horse rider in the distance

expansive green prairie with tall grass surrounding the path
low shrubs and bushes dotting the landscape
dark silhouette of trees on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character walking along a dirt trail through open prairie at sunset. A horse rider appears ahead on the path, passes by, and exits the frame. The landscape features scattered bushes and a distant tree line under a clear evening sky.

events.description: wooden windmill becomes visible on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding dirt path through the open grassland

entered.detail: wooden windmill silhouetted against the sunset sky on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the expansive prairie as the sun sets. A wooden windmill appears on the left horizon and gradually draws closer as the path winds through the grassland. The sky displays warm golden and orange hues.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie at deep dusk with purple sky

events.description: sky transitions to deep purple and vibrant pink sunset colors
wooden fence line appears running parallel to the path on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as darkness falls and the landscape colors shift

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence posts and rails running alongside the trail

segments.scene_description: As dusk deepens, the sky transforms into vibrant purple and pink hues. The windmill passes out of view behind the character, while a wooden fence line emerges on the left side of the path. The trail continues winding through the dimming landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie trail at night with minimal light

events.description: sunset fades to dark night, visibility drops significantly as blue hour ends

agents.ego_description: walking through the darkening landscape as night falls and stars become visible

entered.detail: wooden signpost beside the fence indicating a trail marker

segments.scene_description: Night falls over the prairie as the sky darkens to deep blue and purple. The wooden fence draws closer to the path, and a wooden signpost becomes visible beside it. The character continues walking along the barely illuminated trail as visibility diminishes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a winding dirt trail as a sun-drenched prairie gradually descends into the deep shadows of night. It begins with the character walking through open grassland under a clear evening sky, passing a lone horse rider who disappears ahead toward a distant tree line. As the camera advances, the warm golden and orange hues of the sunset intensify, bringing a wooden windmill into view on the left horizon. The scene then shifts as dusk deepens into vibrant purple and pink tones, with the windmill receding behind the character to make way for a wooden fence line emerging along the path. Finally, the sky darkens to a deep blue and purple as night falls, bringing a wooden signpost into focus beside the fence while visibility diminishes along the barely illuminated trail.
